posts.text: image 1300×385 39.3 KB Strategic 28-year real estate deal between DMart and Adani Logistics in Panvel. Unlike traditional godowns, this facility is a tech-enabled infrastructure featuring automated vehicles, robotic arms, and high-density racking systems. Looks Like DMart has shifted to a long-term lease model. The deal includes an escalation clause of 12% every three years, allowing DMart to secure its long-term expenditure and eliminate rental uncertainty.
